title: US intelligence believes Iran still has ‘significant’ missile launching capabilities as the war continues
content:
US intelligence believes Iran retains substantial missile launching capabilities.
*   Iran's missile arsenal is considered "significant" by US intelligence.
*   This assessment comes amidst ongoing conflict.

title: Delhi HC reserves judgment in Rajpal Yadav case: Actor's lawyer cites 'losses mounting to  ₹17 crore due to film’
content:
The Delhi High Court has reserved its judgment in a case involving actor Rajpal Yadav.
*   Yadav's lawyer argued in court that the actor has incurred significant financial losses.
*   These losses are cited to be ₹17 crore, reportedly stemming from a film project.

title: RBI grants approval to Emirates National Bank of Dubai to acquire up to 74% stake in RBL Bank
content:
The Reserve Bank of India (RBI) has granted its approval for an acquisition.
*   Emirates National Bank of Dubai (ENBD) is the approved acquiring entity.
*   ENBD is authorized to acquire up to a 74% stake in RBL Bank.

title: Amazon in talks to buy $9 billion satellite telecoms group: Report
content:
Amazon is reportedly in talks to buy a satellite telecommunications group.
*   The potential acquisition is valued at $9 billion.
*   The discussions are currently based on a report and are not yet a confirmed deal.

title: Five Indians among 12 injured by Iranian missile debris in Abu Dhabi
content:
Here's the summary in 3 bullet points:

*   12 people were injured in an incident in Abu Dhabi.
*   The injuries were caused by Iranian missile debris.
*   Among the injured were five Indian nationals.

title: HC permits private colleges to collect fees from students under fee reimbursement scheme
content:
The High Court has authorized private colleges to collect fees.
*   This permission specifically applies to students enrolled under the fee reimbursement scheme.
*   Colleges can now collect these fees directly from the students concerned.

title: Bhupinder Hooda, AJL discharged in Panchkula land allotment case
content:
Here's the summary in 3 bullet points:

*   Former Haryana Chief Minister Bhupinder Hooda and Associated Journals Limited (AJL) have been discharged.
*   The discharge relates to the Panchkula land allotment case.
*   This means they are no longer facing charges in this specific legal matter.

title: Tamil Nadu missed out on Central government schemes because DMK saw BJP as an enemy, says G.K. Vasan
content:
Here's the summary in 3 bullet points:

*   G.K. Vasan alleges that Tamil Nadu has missed out on Central government schemes.
*   He attributes this directly to the ruling DMK party viewing the BJP as an adversary.
*   Vasan suggests this political animosity between the two parties has ultimately harmed the state's interests.
